title: Chapter 7
content:
Chapter 7: Chapter 7: Thinking Of Creaming Her!

"Hehe... it runs in our blood, Mom." Owen never stopped, and he could feel that her legs were now shaking from the intensity.

She was getting weaker as her body turned incredibly sensitive... perhaps after not getting watered for many years, her pent-up feelings were finally catching up to her.

"Oh... then my instincts were right." She was happy that it was because of their bloodline.

Her son was definitely a good-willed boy who had been influenced by her husband... she was thankful that Owen was still her innocent boy after all.

"What instincts, Mom?" Owen simply asked.

How could he know what thoughts were running through her mind... he wasn’t a telepath, and definitely not a mind reader.

"Oh my... it’s for your own good, my dear Owen. You are too young to know such bad thoughts." Arielle wagged her index finger, giving him a big, teasing "no" right in front of his face...as she smiled with satisfaction.

She wasn’t going to tell him that her mind was thinking such obscene scenes while he lived in the city.

He was still her innocent son, after all, who was totally oblivious to such lewd things.

Only grown up can only do that kind of thing, and Owen is not up to that matter because he will always be her boy.

Also Arielle must refrained herself from teaching bad things to her son as it’s not a good thing to do when she’s a mother.

Arielle didn’t even consider that Owen was already a grown-up man who was twenty three years old, he would always remain her cutie pie, no matter how much time flew by.

Even if eternity passed, her boy will always remain her cute little boy.

Too bad for her... Owen’s mind is thinking of creaming her!

As his cock is already rock hard as she treated him like a kid... knowing that he got a monstrosity hiding beneath his thin clothes.

’Shit...how is that a motherly acts? I need to control myself or else my dream life would end.’ Owen controlled his urges, he must take it slowly...a slowburn.

"Hehe... now you are the one thinking bad things! You are a bad mom for lying to me~" Never in his wildest dreams did he think Arielle would say that right in front of his face, acting a little playful like a spoiled brat...though he certainly wasn’t complaining.

Getting a mischievous smile and a teasing look while she wagged her finger at him was definitely the best.

How could she do that while standing so close to him...as if she’s seducing him from doing something.

If Owen didn’t have any self control, he would have already lifted her onto the table and savored her like the dish she had just presented.

Too bad, that wasn’t going to happen since he was her son... for now.

"Oh my... acting like you are already grown up, when you haven’t even finished your meal~" Arielle pointed to the food on his plate, scolding him gently like a mother trying to feed her spoiled brat.

"Hehe... it’s your fault, Mom. You hugged me so suddenly that I lost my focus on the heavenly dish you specifically cooked for me~" Owen pinched her stomach with a bit more force to make her squeal but she managed to stopped it before it comes out to her mouth...well her body said otherwise...causing her to shift her body because of the hot coursing into her body...plus her relentless pinching.

Having her sensitive sides touched was definitely not something a MILF, especially one like her who’s pent up deep inside...could easily control.

"Oh my... are you saying that my cooking is the best, my dear~?" Arielle wouldn’t let a compliment pass, especially when it was from her boy!

She had been really starved for compliments for many years now, which was one of the core reasons for her deep loneliness.

"It’s the best, Mom... I could eat this forever. Who would even reject such heavenly cooking from a very special mom~" Owen was completely rock hard now... but he still needed to control his urges since it was too soon to make a direct move.

He needed to completely melt his mother’s defenses before he could reap her fruit!

So... one of the best strategies was to just keep giving and giving her compliments. MILFS are weak when it comes come compliment, Owen is a certified and professional key board warrior so he knows that basic knowledge.

Ding!!!

As if the system knew exactly what he was thinking beforehand, a new chime echoed in his ears.

A brand new quest had appeared for him to take on and raise her affection toward him.

[ Act Like a Spoiled Son and make Arielle feed you like a spoiled boy.]

[Rewards: MILF Token 2 / 32 Exp Points.]

[Failure: Your Divine Cock will turn into a wiener!]

’Freaking shit... what the hell? Another brutal quest failure penalty. That’s definitely more brutal than cock dysfunction.’ Owen almost choked as the quest is failure is another boiling pot that was ready to cook his cock.

’ At least a dysfunctional monster is still a monster... but a freaking wiener?! Heck... I can’t even imagine how a tiny thing like that is going to be useful...’ he was definitely not having a good time with the barrage of teasing penalties the system threw at him from again and again when he just got transmigrated.

He didn’t have a single doubt that the system could truly turn his divine asset into a tiny wiener... after all, it had already sucked him into a completely new world, so shrinking a big thing into a small one would be child’s play!

Still... he didn’t dwell on the system’s teasing because he was more than happy to complete this task!

Getting fed by a busty MILF was surely the dream of every man... not to mention a freaking virgin like him.
